subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Mahdi, inasmuch as thou guidest the people unto the path of righteousness and dost remember thy Lord in days wherein they were seized [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نعیما لک یا مهدی بما تهدی الناس الی سبیل الرشاد و تذکر ربک فی ایام فیها اخذت
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
